component.name: QCalc
component.summary: A multi-purpose calculator for productivity and accessibility

description.p: QCalc is more than just a simple calculator — it's a modern productivity tool. Built with Vue 3, Quasar, and Electron, this multi-purpose calculator provides four professional calculators in one: standard calculator, unit converter, currency converter, and programmer calculator.

ul.li: High-precision calculation engine supporting up to 64 digits
Unit converter with 15+ categories (length, area, volume, weight, etc.)
Real-time currency converter with latest exchange rates
Programmer calculator with binary/octal/decimal/hexadecimal conversion and bitwise operations
Calculation history with notes and CSV export/import
Various color themes and dark mode support
Comprehensive keyboard shortcuts for power users

description.p: Electron 40 upgrade, Vue 3.5+ modernization, Vitest test infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline, and CSP security hardening.
Number format per calculator feature and various bug fixes.
